## PROFESSIONAL PROFILE
Senior Java Engineer with 12+ years building secure, resilient microservices in financial, superannuation, and enterprise platforms. Leads Java 21/Spring Boot 3.x migrations, CVE remediation, API governance, and CI/CD release orchestration. Designed an agentic SDLC with governance gates to accelerate delivery without sacrificing quality. Bridges legacy stability with modern, testable architectures.

• Defect Management & Troubleshooting — Used Kubernetes logs, Application Insights, and x‑correlation‑ids to triage deep API errors; reproduced scenarios via Postman to isolate root causes.
